title: VolumeScroll
description: Adjust Simple Voice Chat players volume with RMB + Mouse Wheel Scroll
body:
# VolumeScroll Mod that allows to adjust individual player volume in [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) with RMB + Mouse Wheel Scroll

Just like in [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) :D

![preview gif](https://github.com/DimasKama/VolumeScroll/blob/master/images/preview.gif?raw=true)
